results.output:
The draft is ready for your reply. Here it is:

**[Open draft in Spark](https://sparkmailapp.com/dpl/bl?token=EXAMPLE4470)**

It's been attached to the existing thread (message 3321), draft ID 4470. Take a look and hit send whenever you're ready.

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 6601 --body "Hey Bob, just bumping this in case it slipped through. Could you confirm on the contract redlines when you get a chance?"
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 3321 --body "Hi Carol, legal is reviewing the contract now and we expect to have it back to you by Thursday. Thanks for your patience."
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 7788 --body "Hi Alice, the proposal looks good, we're in."
```

```bash
spark draft --edit 9012 --body "Thanks - Friday works. I'll bring the metrics doc."
```

```bash
spark draft --to "alice@example.com" --subject "Q3 kickoff agenda" --body "Hi Alice,

Here's the agenda for our Q3 kickoff:

1. Budget review
2. Hiring plan
3. Migration timeline

Planning doc: https://example.com/plan

Best,
Drew"
```

```bash
spark search --filter "to:alice@example.com subject:pricing" --in me@example.com:Drafts
spark thread <id-from-above>
```
